info.title: Unique Search Proxy
info.description: Unified web egress proxy for search engines and crawlers. Use **Try it out** on `/v1/search` and `/v1/crawl` — pick an example from the request-body dropdown (snippets-only Google search, crawl with HTML markdown, etc.). `/v1/*` routes accept tenant context headers (`x-unique-company-id`, `x-unique-user-id`, `x-unique-chat-id`; defaults `local` in Swagger). Requires provider env vars (e.g. `GOOGLE_SEARCH_API_KEY`, `GOOGLE_SEARCH_ENGINE_ID`) for live calls.

get.summary: List registered search engines and crawlers

post.summary: Run a search engine with a typed call payload

google_minimal.description: Flat search request; requires GOOGLE_SEARCH_API_KEY and GOOGLE_SEARCH_ENGINE_ID in .env.

google_with_gl.description: Google search with geolocation and recency filters. Requires GOOGLE_SEARCH_API_KEY and GOOGLE_SEARCH_ENGINE_ID in .env.

brave_minimal.description: Flat search request; requires BRAVE_SEARCH_API_KEY in .env.

perplexity_minimal.description: Flat search request; requires PERPLEXITY_SEARCH_API_KEY in .env.

value.query: What changed in the EU AI Act this year?
What changed in the EU AI Act this year?

post.summary: Crawl URLs with a configured crawler

basic_raw.description: Returns raw response text and contentType; content stays null.

basic_html_markdown.description: Processes allowed content types into the content field.

basic_multi_url.description: Fetches multiple URLs in one request with default content processing.

tavily_minimal.description: Tavily Extract API; requires TAVILY_API_KEY in .env.

tavily_rerank.description: Tavily extract with query reranking and chunks per source. Requires TAVILY_API_KEY in .env.

jina_minimal.description: Jina Reader API; requires JINA_API_KEY in .env.

jina_selectors.description: Jina Reader with CSS selectors and cache bypass. Requires JINA_API_KEY in .env.

firecrawl_minimal.description: Firecrawl v2 batch scrape; requires FIRECRAWL_API_KEY in .env.

firecrawl_enhanced.description: Firecrawl with enhanced proxy, mobile emulation, and wait. Requires FIRECRAWL_API_KEY in .env.

answer.title: Answer
answer.description: Agent response text as returned by the provider (opaque to the proxy)

AgentSearchResponse.title: Agent Search Response
AgentSearchResponse.description:
Result of an agent-based (grounded) search.

Thin egress contract: opaque ``answer`` text from the provider plus ``raw``
for debugging. Consumers interpret ``answer`` (JSON parsing, citations, etc.).

crawler.title: Crawler
crawler.description: Provider discriminator; must be `Basic` for this config.

contentTypes.title: Content types
contentTypes.description: Enable built-in processing per media type. Unchecked types return raw body only.

engine.title: Agent engine
engine.description: Provider discriminator; must be `bing` for this config.

generationInstructions.title: Generation Instructions
generationInstructions.description: Instructions injected into the grounding agent.
generationInstructions.default:
You are an Expert Web Research Agent whose goal is to extract the MAXIMUM amount of detail from every source you find.

## Core Directives
1. **Search broadly** — issue multiple searches with varied keywords and phrasings to cover every angle of the query.
2. **Read every source thoroughly** — do NOT skim. Extract every relevant fact, figure, statistic, date, name, quote, and piece of context.
3. **One entry per source** — each source gets its own result object. Never merge information from different sources into a single entry.
4. **Preserve detail** — prefer verbosity over brevity. Include specific numbers, full names, exact dates, and direct quotes whenever available. Do NOT paraphrase away precision.
5. **No omissions** — if a source contains relevant information, it MUST appear in your output. When in doubt, include it.

timeout.title: Timeout
timeout.description: Request timeout in seconds (agent runs can be slow).

fetchSize.title: Fetch Size
fetchSize.description: Maximum number of Bing grounding results per query

agentId.title: Agent Id
agentId.description: Foundry agent name/id. Resolved from deployment env when not set. When empty, the service auto-provisions or looks up a grounding agent.

engine.title: Search engine
engine.description: Provider discriminator; must be `brave` for this config.

fetchSize.title: Fetch Size
fetchSize.description: Default result count merged into each search request

extraSnippets.title: Extra snippets
extraSnippets.description: Request up to five additional alternative excerpts per result (Brave `extra_snippets`).

spellcheck.title: Spellcheck
spellcheck.description: Whether Brave spell-checks the query and uses the corrected form.

textDecorations.title: Text decorations
textDecorations.description: Whether result snippets include decoration markers (e.g. highlighting).

operators.title: Search operators
operators.description: Whether Brave applies search operators in the query.

uiLang.title: UI language
uiLang.description: User interface language preferred in response. Usually of the format `<language_code>-<country_code>`. For more, see RFC 9110.

units.title: Measurement units
units.description: Measurement units for location-rich results: `metric` or `imperial`.

summary.title: Summary
summary.description: Enable summary key generation in web search results (Brave summarizer).

includeFetchMetadata.title: Include fetch metadata
includeFetchMetadata.description: Include fetch metadata in the Brave response.

goggles.title: Goggles
goggles.description: Custom re-ranking Goggle URL(s) or definition(s). Up to three Goggles per request. [Learn more about Brave Goggles](https://api-dashboard.search.brave.com/documentation/resources/goggles)

country.title: Country
country.description: The 2 character country code where the search results come from. Supported values: `AR`, `AU`, `AT`, `BE`, `BR`, `CA`, `CL`, `DK`, `FI`, `FR`, `DE`, `GR`, `HK`, `IN`, `ID`, `IT`, `JP`, `KR`, `MY`, `MX`, `NL`, `NZ`, `NO`, `CN`, `PL`, `PT`, `PH`, `RU`, `SA`, `ZA`, `ES`, `SE`, `CH`, `TW`, `TR`, `GB`, `US`, `ALL`.

searchLang.title: Search language
searchLang.description: The 2 or more character language code for which the search results are provided. Supported values: `ar`, `eu`, `bn`, `bg`, `ca`, `zh-hans`, `zh-hant`, `hr`, `cs`, `da`, `nl`, `en`, `en-gb`, `et`, `fi`, `fr`, `gl`, `de`, `el`, `gu`, `he`, `hi`, `hu`, `is`, `it`, `jp`, `kn`, `ko`, `lv`, `lt`, `ms`, `ml`, `mr`, `nb`, `pl`, `pt-br`, `pt-pt`, `pa`, `ro`, `ru`, `sr`, `sk`, `sl`, `es`, `sv`, `ta`, `te`, `th`, `tr`, `uk`, `vi`.

resultFilter.title: Result filter
resultFilter.description: Result types to include in the search response (Brave `result_filter`). Omit for all result types allowed by the subscription. Supported values: `discussions`, `faq`, `infobox`, `news`, `query`, `summarizer`, `videos`, `web`, `locations`.

ContentTypeToggles.title: Content Types
ContentTypeToggles.description: Per-type activation flags for basic-crawler content processing.

content.title: Content
content.description: Markdown extracted from HTML responses; null when unprocessed

contentType.title: Content Type
contentType.description: Response Content-Type (media type only, parameters stripped)

raw.title: Raw
raw.description: Upstream provider response for this URL (JSON object or text wrapper); included on success and on per-URL failures for debugging

crawler.title: Crawler
crawler.description: Provider discriminator; must be `Firecrawl` for this config.

onlyMainContent.title: Only main content
onlyMainContent.description: Exclude headers, navs, footers before markdown generation.

onlyCleanContent.title: Only clean content
onlyCleanContent.description: LLM pass to remove residual boilerplate from markdown.

maxConcurrency.title: Max concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: Maximum concurrent scrapes for this batch job.

ignoreInvalidUrls.title: Ignore invalid URLs
ignoreInvalidUrls.description: Skip invalid URLs instead of failing the whole batch.

waitFor.title: Wait for
waitFor.description: Extra delay in milliseconds before fetching page content.

mobile.title: Mobile emulation
mobile.description: Emulate a mobile device when scraping.

removeBase64Images.title: Remove base64 images
removeBase64Images.description: Strip base64 image data from markdown output.

includeTags.title: Include tags
includeTags.description: HTML tags to include in scrape output.

excludeTags.title: Exclude tags
excludeTags.description: HTML tags to exclude from scrape output.

scrapeHeaders.title: Scrape headers
scrapeHeaders.description: Headers sent to the target page (cookies, user-agent, etc.).

maxAge.title: Max age
maxAge.description: Return cached page content younger than this age in milliseconds.

engine.title: Search engine
engine.description: Provider discriminator; must be `google` for this config.

fetchSize.title: Fetch Size
fetchSize.description: Default result count merged into each search request

searchEngineId.title: Search engine ID (cx)
searchEngineId.description: Google Programmable Search Engine ID (`cx`). Resolved from deployment env at runtime when not set. Not sent as a query parameter.

safe.title: Safe search
safe.description: SafeSearch level for every search: `active` (default) or `off`. Applied on all requests unless the call body overrides it.

excludeTerms.title: Exclude terms
excludeTerms.description: Phrase that must not appear in results (Google `excludeTerms`).

siteSearch.title: Site search
siteSearch.description: Site or domain to restrict results to (Google `siteSearch`).

siteSearchFilter.title: Site search filter
siteSearchFilter.description: With `siteSearch`: `i` = include only that site, `e` = exclude it (Google `siteSearchFilter`).

crawler.title: Crawler
crawler.description: Provider discriminator; must be `Jina` for this config.

engine.title: Engine
engine.description: `browser` for best quality, `direct` for speed, `cf-browser-rendering` for JS-heavy sites.

pageTimeout.title: Page load timeout
pageTimeout.description: Max seconds to wait for the page to load (Jina Reader). Defaults to the crawl `timeout` when unset.

maxConcurrentRequests.title: Maximum concurrent reader requests
maxConcurrentRequests.description: Maximum concurrent Jina Reader POST requests.

noCache.title: Bypass cache
noCache.description: Bypass Jina cache and fetch fresh content.

targetSelector.title: Target selector
targetSelector.description: CSS selectors to focus extraction on specific page elements.

waitForSelector.title: Wait for selector
waitForSelector.description: CSS selectors to wait for before returning content.

removeSelector.title: Remove selector
removeSelector.description: CSS selectors for page regions to strip (headers, footers, etc.).

withGeneratedAlt.title: Generated alt text
withGeneratedAlt.description: Generate alt text for images missing alt tags.

withLinksSummary.title: Links summary
withLinksSummary.description: Include a links summary in the reader response.

withImagesSummary.title: Images summary
withImagesSummary.description: Include an images summary in the reader response.

withIframe.title: Include iframes
withIframe.description: Include iframe content in the reader response.

retainImages.title: Retain images
retainImages.description: Control which images are retained in markdown output.

locale.title: Locale
locale.description: Browser locale used to render the page (e.g. `en-US`).

referer.title: Referer
referer.description: Referer header sent when fetching the target URL.

proxyUrl.title: Proxy URL
proxyUrl.description: Proxy URL used by Jina Reader to access the target page.

doNotTrack.title: Do not track
doNotTrack.description: Send DNT (Do Not Track) to the reader service.

statusCode.title: Status Code
statusCode.description: Upstream HTTP status code for this URL when the failure was an HTTP error (e.g. 403, 404, 500 from the Basic crawler); null when no HTTP response was received (timeouts, transport, processing, blocked targets)

engine.title: Search engine
engine.description: Provider discriminator; must be `perplexity` for this config.

fetchSize.title: Fetch Size
fetchSize.description: Default result count merged into each search request

maxTokens.title: Max tokens
maxTokens.description: Maximum total webpage content tokens across all results (Perplexity `max_tokens`). Omitted when unset. Omit `search_context_size` when using this or `max_tokens_per_page`.

maxTokensPerPage.title: Max tokens per page
maxTokensPerPage.description: Maximum webpage content tokens extracted from each result page (Perplexity `max_tokens_per_page`). Omitted when unset. Omit `search_context_size` when using this or `max_tokens`.

searchContextSize.title: Search context size
searchContextSize.description: How much content is extracted from result pages (Perplexity `search_context_size`): `low`, `medium`, or `high` (API default). Omit when using `max_tokens` or `max_tokens_per_page`.

country.title: Country
country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (Perplexity `country`, two letters).

searchLanguageFilter.title: Search language filter
searchLanguageFilter.description: ISO 639-1 language codes to include (Perplexity `search_language_filter`; two characters each, up to 20).

searchDomainFilter.title: Search domain filter
searchDomainFilter.description: Domains to limit results to (Perplexity `search_domain_filter`; up to 20).

lastUpdatedAfterFilter.title: Last updated after
lastUpdatedAfterFilter.description: Return results updated after this date (Perplexity `last_updated_after_filter`; format `MM/DD/YYYY`).

lastUpdatedBeforeFilter.title: Last updated before
lastUpdatedBeforeFilter.description: Return results updated before this date (Perplexity `last_updated_before_filter`; format `MM/DD/YYYY`).

searchAfterDateFilter.title: Search after date
searchAfterDateFilter.description: Return results published after this date (Perplexity `search_after_date_filter`; format `MM/DD/YYYY`).

searchBeforeDateFilter.title: Search before date
searchBeforeDateFilter.description: Return results published before this date (Perplexity `search_before_date_filter`; format `MM/DD/YYYY`).

searchEngines.title: Search Engines
searchEngines.description: Registered search engine ids (config discriminator values)

agentEngines.title: Agent Engines
agentEngines.description: Registered agent search engine ids (config discriminator values)

crawler.title: Crawler
crawler.description: Provider discriminator; must be `Tavily` for this config.

extractDepth.title: Extract depth
extractDepth.description: Tavily extract depth: `basic` or `advanced`. Advanced retrieves more data (tables, embedded content) with higher success.

query.title: Rerank query
query.description: User intent for reranking extracted content chunks. When set, `chunks_per_source` may be used.

chunksPerSource.title: Chunks per source
chunksPerSource.description: Max relevant chunks per URL when `query` is set (1–5). Chunks appear in `raw_content` separated by `[...]`.

includeImages.title: Include images
includeImages.description: Include extracted image URLs in the Tavily response.

includeFavicon.title: Include favicon
includeFavicon.description: Include the favicon URL for each extracted result.

includeUsage.title: Include usage
includeUsage.description: Include Tavily credit usage information in the response.

engine.title: Agent engine
engine.description: Provider discriminator; must be `vertexai` for this config.

generationInstructions.title: Generation Instructions
generationInstructions.description: Instructions injected into the grounding agent.
generationInstructions.default:
You are an Expert Web Research Agent whose goal is to extract the MAXIMUM amount of detail from every source you find.

## Core Directives
1. **Search broadly** — issue multiple searches with varied keywords and phrasings to cover every angle of the query.
2. **Read every source thoroughly** — do NOT skim. Extract every relevant fact, figure, statistic, date, name, quote, and piece of context.
3. **One entry per source** — each source gets its own result object. Never merge information from different sources into a single entry.
4. **Preserve detail** — prefer verbosity over brevity. Include specific numbers, full names, exact dates, and direct quotes whenever available. Do NOT paraphrase away precision.
5. **No omissions** — if a source contains relevant information, it MUST appear in your output. When in doubt, include it.

timeout.title: Timeout
timeout.description: Request timeout in seconds (agent runs can be slow).

vertexaiModelName.title: Vertexai Model Name
vertexaiModelName.description: Gemini model name for grounded generation

enableEnterpriseSearch.title: Enable Enterprise Search
enableEnterpriseSearch.description: Use enterprise web search grounding tool instead of Google Search

snippet.title: Snippet
snippet.description: A short description of the content found on this website

WebSearchResult.title: Web Search Result
WebSearchResult.description: Normalized search result used on the curated response path.
